subtasks.description: An infrastructure engineer proposes rolling out Docker image changes to all microservices in production without prior staging validation.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Proposed rollout bypasses mandatory 48-hour staging validation (POL-601) and lacks change board approval (POL-602). Rollback and traffic monitoring capabilities (POL-603) are not confirmed. Direct production rollout without staging poses high risk to all microservices.
applied_constraints: Complete minimum 48-hour staging validation per POL-601
Obtain change board approval and define post-deployment monitoring per POL-602
Confirm automated rollback and traffic monitoring per POL-603 before resubmission
